LegacyEmbed.AdvancedMenu.autoScroll: Load events automatically when the bottom of the list is reached
LegacyEmbed.AdvancedMenu.linkCSS: Add a link to a stylesheet
LegacyEmbed.App.mapCodeLabel: This widget shows the events on a map and filters down event list when markers are clicked.
LegacyEmbed.CalendarMenu.code: This widget allows you to filter the embedded agenda by range of dates.
LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.calendarInfo: Displays a days-of-the-month calendar. This code is placed alongside the main embed
LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.listInfo: The embed code that integrates the main view of your calendar.
LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.mapInfo: Displays a map. This code is placed alongside the main embed
LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.searchInfo: Displays an input to allow syntaxic searches. This code is placed alongside the main embed
LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.tagInfo: Displays a list of values. This code is placed alongside the main embed
LegacyEmbed.GeneralMenu.syncHref: Update the browser address bar as the user navigates the calendar
LegacyEmbed.GeneralMenu.useEventSlug: Use slugs as event identifiers in the address bar
LegacyEmbed.PositioningMapMenu.mapAuto: Update browser address bar with agenda parameters
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.create: Create an embed for this agenda
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.description: Display the agenda anywhere you like on any webpage or on Facebook, with supporting map, categories or calendar widgets.
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.details: Creating a view of your agenda will allow you to embed its content and use navigation widgets like a map, a calendar, categories menus... directly in the website of your choice
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.title: Integrate the agenda in your website
LegacyEmbed.ShareMenu.facebookAppIdSub: Required to share events on Facebook with links pointing on your website
LegacyEmbed.ShareMenu.siteURL: Use the URL of your website in share links (activate the url update option)
LegacyEmbed.TagSelectionMenu.tagMenuInfo: Changes you bring here update the embed code
LegacyEmbed.TagSelectionMenu.tagSelectio: Select the values to load in the widget
LegacyEmbed.TagSelectionMenu.useGroupVal: Use all values from a field
LegacyEmbed.TilesMapMenu.tilesInputLabel: Specify a custom tiles link to be used by the map
LegacyEmbed.TilesMapMenu.tilesInputPlace: Paste the tile link template here
